title: Change background to blue and add steam iron image

requirements.text: Change the hero section background color to blue

quotes: change the background color to Blue

acceptanceCriteria: Hero section displays a blue background color
Blue color is visible and replaces the current background styling

requirements.text: Add a small steam iron image positioned on the right side of the hero section

quotes: add a small picture with an steam iron on the right

acceptanceCriteria: A steam iron image is visible in the hero section
The image is positioned on the right side
The image size is appropriately small and does not overwhelm the layout

constraints: Maintain existing hero section layout and content structure
Preserve the responsive design of the hero section
nonGoals: Modifying the overall color scheme beyond the hero section
Adding steam iron imagery to other sections

required: Small realistic steam iron on transparent or white background, positioned for right-side placement (steam-iron.dim_300x300.png)
